cases.rationale: CDSI HPV 2-dose: minAgeToStart 9y (3285d), maxAgeToStart 15y (5475d). Code line 369 hpvStart=132 (11y routine).
CDSI 2-dose D2 minInt=150d. Code line 393 sets minInt: ys && !immuno ? 150 : 28.

cases.description: Sexual abuse history: HPV recommended starting at age 9 (108mo)
cases.rationale: Code line 369 hpvStart = 108 when sexual_abuse risk. CDSI Risk 2-dose minAgeToStart=0 (any age ≥9y allowed).
CDSI HPV Risk 3-dose (immunocomp): D2 minInt=28d. Code line 393 minInt = ys && !immuno ? 150 : 28 → 28 because immuno=true.
CDSI 3-dose minAgeToStart=5475d (15y). Code line 374: ys = firstHpvAgeDays < 180*30.4 — at am=180 with no doses, ys=false → 3-dose.

cases.description: Catch-up cutoff at 27y birthday (am=324mo), not 26y birthday (am=312mo)
cases.rationale: Bug from great-gates AUDIT G1: previous code `am > 312` made 26y1m-26y11m patients display as 27-45y SCDM. CDC: catch-up through age 26y. Fixed by switching to `am >= 228 && am < 324` for catch-up window. Status 'recommended' (catch-up) — note text varies.
At exactly 27y, patient enters SCDM window. Both isCatchup26 and isShared2745 → status 'recommended'. Note: hpvStatus is 'recommended' for both arms; differentiator is the description string.
